title: gleichenia laevigata
intro: Gleichenia laevigata, also known as the smooth strap fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. It is native to Australia and New Zealand, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia laevigata include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
